releaseNotes: • Low-RAM devices: search method is now auto-set to LIKE substring on first run (devices under 2300 MB, like the onn 4K Plus). The in-memory cache is never built on these devices, so the previous default of "in-memory" was misleading — the search silently fell through to FTS. The setting in the UI now matches the actual search path, with no extra cost on inserts (FTS triggers are dropped for LIKE).
